name: ACE Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Utility bill payments and recharges on Google Pay

domestic: Complimentary domestic lounge access is subject to a spend threshold of ₹50,000 in the previous three calendar months (effective 1st May 2024). Spend criteria is waived for the month of card issuance and the next three months.

exclusions: card fees and other bank charges
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹4,000, capped at ₹500 per billing cycle
Dining Delights discounts of up to 15% at partner restaurants via EazyDiner
additionalDetails: Cashback is directly credited to your statement in the next billing cycle.
The 5% and 4% cashback categories have a combined monthly capping of ₹500.

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02

Complimentary domestic lounge access is subject to a spend threshold of ₹50,000 in the previous three calendar months (effective 1st May 2024). Spend criteria is waived for the month of card issuance and the next three months.
Annual fee waiver tracking of ₹2 lakh excludes rent and wallet load transactions.
Utility bill payments are capped at a combined limit of ₹500 per month along with food delivery and Ola spends.
Cashback is credited to the card account 3 days prior to the statement generation date.
